pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with Jakarta EE 9+ APIs required by Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build may still target Java 17 bytecode or fail to utilize Java 21 features, though it might compile; however, in the context of a JDK migration recipe, this is the explicit intent to switch the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; using it with Spring Boot 3.x or modern MySQL drivers causes dependency resolution failures or runtime class loading issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency to enable Jakarta Bean Validation support.
Remove the explicit version from the Jakarta Validation API dependency to let Spring Boot manage it.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/contro.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/contro.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/servic.general_idea: Replace deprecated Optional.isPresent() with Optional.isEmpty() for modern Java style.

src/test/java/com/CarRentalAgency/reposi.general_idea: Remove deprecated SpringExtension usage in favor of Spring Boot's auto-configuration for JUnit 5.

src/test/java/com/CarRentalAgency/servic.general_idea: Remove deprecated SpringExtension usage in favor of implicit JUnit 5 Spring support.
Remove unused import for deprecated SpringExtension class.
Remove unused import for JUnit 5 ExtendWith annotation.
